blockingIssues.description: l7-s8 (Extending 8-bit to 16-bit Programs) has empty examples array [] despite the extending-8bit-16bit example existing in examples.json. The example was never linked to l7-s8 in lectures.json, violating VAL-CONTENT-001.
blockingIssues.fix: Add 'extending-8bit-16bit' to the examples array for l7-s8 in lectures.json

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that examples must be linked in lectures.json, not just added to examples.json. Workers may add examples to examples.json but forget to update the section's examples array in lectures.json.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: lecture7-examples-stack-concepts added extending-8bit-16bit to examples.json but didn't link it in lectures.json l7-s8 section

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify VAL-CONTENT-006 requires minimum 2 assessment items per section. The current phrasing 'has assessment items' is ambiguous - workers interpreted it as 'has at least 1' when the contract requires 2.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: lecture7-examples-stack-concepts handoff claimed 'All 9 L7 sections have assessment items' but several have only 1 item, not 2 as required

rejectedObservations.reason: Skill availability is an infrastructure issue for the orchestrator to address, not a code review finding
